name: python3-cloudscraper
title: python3-cloudscraper
summary: Request pages with Cloudflare's anti-bot page
description:
Request pages with Cloudflare's anti-bot page
This can be useful if you wish to scrape or crawl a website protected with
Cloudflare. Cloudflare's anti-bot page currently just checks if the client
supports JavaScript, though they may add additional techniques in the future.
.
The cloudscraper API is the same as requests.sessions.Session.
.
python-cloudscraper try to solve the challenge using a Python native solver.
Other possible solvers: using nodejs to solve the JavaScript challenge or
using external APIs. The documentation specify which ones are available
(/usr/share/doc/python3-cloudscraper/README.md.gz).
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cloudscraper because Request pages with Cloudflare's anti-bot page.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cloudscraper as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cloudscraper with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cloudscraper --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
